channel.title: Culture on Picnic Spoons
channel.description: Recent content in Culture on Picnic Spoons

item.title: Domestic Culture
item.description: Notes on the making of a household life. One work-from-home, stay-at-home spouse’s experience with the mundane.

item.title: Libraries as Emotional Architecture
item.description: How the catalog of books I carry with me has influenced my perspective and built scaffolding from which to hang my experiences.
